_fixture_meta.describes: An ETag whose hash input mixes a request-local timestamp into the JCS-encoded tuple. This is forbidden by PRD-109-R17 (no request-local data in the hash input) and PRD-103-R7 (determinism contract). Beyond the determinism break, mixing a timestamp introduces a measurable side-channel that correlates with the server's wall clock.
_fixture_meta.rejection_reason: Hash input includes 'now' (request timestamp). Producers MUST NOT mix request-local data into the ETag input.

expected_error.missing: ETag hash input contains a request-local timestamp; expected only {payload, identity, tenant} per PRD-103-R6 / PRD-109-R17.
